  "claims": [
    "California is transitioning all 3,000 seasonal CAL FIRE firefighters to full-time status 365 days per year.",
    "The investment in CAL FIRE aims to address longer and more destructive fire seasons each year.",
    "The ranks of CAL FIRE firefighters have nearly doubled from 6,700 to over 12,000 in the past decade.",
    "California plans to hire another 2,100 CAL FIRE firefighters over the next 48 months.",
